rationale: Traffic at 2/day with 0 organic. All internal SEO done (375 sitemap URLs). 3 existing blog posts target generic keywords. Adding game-specific blog posts targets lower-competition long-tail keywords (valorant aim test, lol talent test) and creates shareable content for those communities. Last eval explicitly recommended this.

spec.title: Add 2 game-community-targeted blog posts (Valorant + League of Legends)
changes: Add blog post 'valorant-talent-test' targeting Valorant FPS community (EN+ZH)
Add blog post 'league-of-legends-talent' targeting MOBA community (EN+ZH)
Both posts reference GameTan test dimensions relevant to each game
Both posts include realistic pro player cognitive data
Both posts have CTA linking to /quiz
testCriteria: GET /blog returns 200 and shows 5 posts total
GET /sitemap.xml includes both new blog URLs
